future_sampler_allowed_only_after: fresh board row claims staged-copy cfd-pp scope
source cases are terminal successful or explicitly launchable under a new row
preflight can compute aggregate RAF < 0.01 and RMF < 0.01
same-QOI UQ family plan is declared or diagnostic-only status is accepted
guardrail: planning package only; raw samples require a later staged-copy sampler row
